name_en: Glass Plate Negatives of the Hosono Rihei Family (Kadoya)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the fine arts and crafts category. It is municipally designated by Machida City, with designation dated January 10, 2015. It is located at Nozutamachi 897, Machida City, Tokyo.

A tangible cultural property in the buildings category. It is municipally designated by Machida City, with designation dated January 25, 2018. It is located at Tsuruma 6-32-16, Machida City, Tokyo.
A former site (kyūseki) in the monuments category. It is municipally designated by Machida City, with designation dated June 28, 2023. It is located at Nozutamachi 897, Machida City, Tokyo.
A craft object classified as a tangible cultural property of Meguro. It is designated by the ward (Meguro Ward).

name_en: Buddhist Scripture Commentaries in the Hand of Fujaku Tokumon
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the classical books category. It is designated by the ward (Meguro Ward).

A historic site in the monuments category. It is designated by the ward (Meguro Ward).
